function.name: replace-lines-in-file
function.description: Overwrite lines in an existing file. Use this tool when updating code/config/etc files and modifying or removing **existing** lines, not adding new lines. You MUST read any files you intend to update with line numbers enabled so you're able to correctly generate a call to this tool. The updated file will be returned. The size of the old and new hunks do not need to match. The lines between firstReplacedLine and lastReplacedLine (both inclusive) will be deleted and newLines put in there instead.

firstReplacedLine.description: The first line that will be replaced with the content from newLines.

lastReplacedLine.description: The last line that will be replaced with the content from newLines.

newLines.description: The new lines that will be inserted. Existing lines can be deleted by leaving newLines as the empty string.

relativePath.description: The file path whose content will be updated, relative to the current directory.
